update.description: A new version of Youwee is available. Would you like to update now?
update.ready: Update downloaded successfully! Restart to apply changes.

backendErrors.TRANSCRIPT_NOT_AVAILABLE: No transcript available for this video.
backendErrors.YT_RATE_LIMITED: YouTube rate limited. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
backendErrors.YT_PRIVATE_VIDEO: This video is private. Enable authentication in Settings.
backendErrors.YT_AGE_RESTRICTED: This video is age-restricted. Enable authentication in Settings.
backendErrors.YT_MEMBERS_ONLY: This video is for members only. Use a subscribed account.
backendErrors.YT_SIGNIN_REQUIRED: This video requires sign-in. Enable authentication in Settings.
backendErrors.YT_GEO_RESTRICTED: This video is not available in your region.
backendErrors.YT_NO_SUBTITLES: No subtitles are available for this video.
backendErrors.YT_COOKIE_DB_LOCKED: Browser cookie database is locked. Close the browser and retry, or use cookie file mode.
backendErrors.YT_FRESH_COOKIES_REQUIRED: Fresh login cookies are required. Refresh browser login and retry.
backendErrors.NETWORK_REQUEST_FAILED: Network request failed. Please check your connection and retry.
backendErrors.YTDLP_NOT_FOUND: yt-dlp not found. Check Dependencies settings.
backendErrors.YTDLP_SYSTEM_NOT_FOUND: System yt-dlp not found. Install it via your package manager or switch to App managed.
backendErrors.YTDLP_APP_NOT_FOUND: App-managed yt-dlp not found. Install it from Settings > Dependencies.
backendErrors.YTDLP_SYSTEM_MANAGED: System yt-dlp is managed externally. Update it with your package manager or switch to App managed.
backendErrors.GALLERYDL_NOT_FOUND: System gallery-dl not found. Install it with your package manager or pip, then retry.
backendErrors.ARIA2_NOT_FOUND: aria2c not found. Install aria2 and make sure aria2c is available in PATH.
backendErrors.FFMPEG_NOT_FOUND: FFmpeg not found. Check Dependencies settings.
backendErrors.FFMPEG_SYSTEM_MANAGED: System FFmpeg is managed externally. Update it with your package manager or switch to App managed.
